1555.reason: [The syntax component name should be printed BEFORE analyzing its children, not after. According to requirements: "Before completing the analysis of any syntax components... output the name of the current syntax component"]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The syntax component name should be printed BEFORE analyzing its children, not after. According to requirements: "Before completing the analysis of any syntax components... output the name of the current syntax component"]

510.reason: [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+1 or index+2 exceeds token list bounds, and the logic incorrectly assumes function definitions must be followed by '(' at index+2]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+1 or index+2 exceeds token list bounds, and the logic incorrectly assumes function definitions must be followed by '(' at index+2]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+1 or index+2 exceeds token list bounds, and the logic is flawed because it assumes function definitions must be followed by '(' which may not be immediately visible at index+2]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException risk: accessing index+1 and index+2 without checking if they are within tokens.size(); also logic flaw - this condition doesn't correctly identify function definitions vs declarations]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Accessing tokens.get(index + 1) and tokens.get(index + 2) can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when index is near the end of the token list. Also, the condition logic is flawed for determining function definitions vs declarations.]

516.reason: [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+1 exceeds token list bounds, and doesn't properly check for end of input]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+1 exceeds token list bounds, and doesn't properly check for end of input]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when index+1 exceeds token list bounds, and it incorrectly assumes that any non-main token sequence must be a function definition]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException risk: accessing index+1 without bounds check; also incorrect logic for detecting main function]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Same IndexOutOfBoundsException risk with tokens.get(index + 1), and this condition doesn't properly identify function definitions since it only checks for MAINTK without considering other valid function type keywords like VOIDTK, INTTK, CHARTK followed by identifier and LPARENT.]
